criteriaResults.criterion: AppShell component wraps all pages with sidebar and header
criteriaResults.evidence: App.tsx wraps Routes in AppShell. Sidebar, Header, main all present on / and /projects.

criteriaResults.criterion: Sidebar displays nav items: Dashboard, Projects, Tasks, Team, Settings with Lucide icons
criteriaResults.evidence: navItems.ts defines 5 items with Lucide icons. Playwright confirms 5 links with SVG icons and correct labels.

criteriaResults.criterion: Each nav item links to corresponding route via React Router NavLink
criteriaResults.evidence: Sidebar.tsx uses NavLink. Playwright verified href attributes and actual navigation to /projects and /tasks.

criteriaResults.criterion: Active page highlighted with distinct background/text color
criteriaResults.evidence: NavLink applies bg-blue-50 text-blue-700 when active. Confirmed via class inspection on / and /projects.

criteriaResults.criterion: Sidebar collapse toggle button shrinks to icons-only mode
criteriaResults.evidence: Collapse button toggles w-60 to w-16. Labels hidden, 5 SVG icons remain. Expand restores w-60.

criteriaResults.criterion: Collapsed/expanded state persists via SidebarContext to localStorage
criteriaResults.evidence: useLocalStorage('sidebar-collapsed') persists. After collapse + reload, sidebar stays w-16. localStorage value is 'true'.
Sidebar renders <aside> with <nav aria-label='Main navigation'>. Both confirmed attached.

criteriaResults.criterion: Header fixed at top, spans content area width
criteriaResults.evidence: Header has sticky top-0 z-30. Flex child of content column spans full width.

criteriaResults.criterion: Header contains search input with search icon and placeholder text
criteriaResults.evidence: input[type=search] with placeholder='Search...' and Lucide Search SVG icon visible.

criteriaResults.criterion: Header contains notifications bell icon with unread dot indicator
criteriaResults.evidence: Bell button with SVG icon and red dot (bg-red-500 rounded-full) confirmed.

criteriaResults.criterion: Header contains user avatar that opens dropdown menu on click
criteriaResults.evidence: Avatar button toggles role=menu dropdown. Click opens, click closes.

criteriaResults.criterion: Dropdown contains Profile, Settings, Logout options
criteriaResults.evidence: Three menuitem buttons with Profile, Settings, Logout labels visible.
useClickOutside hook on userMenuRef. Clicking main area closes open dropdown.

criteriaResults.criterion: Below 768px: sidebar hidden, hamburger icon in header
criteriaResults.evidence: At 375px: sidebar hidden (hidden md:flex), hamburger visible (md:hidden) with SVG.

criteriaResults.criterion: Mobile: hamburger opens full-screen overlay with backdrop
criteriaResults.evidence: Fixed inset-0 overlay with bg-black/50 backdrop and role=dialog aria-modal=true. All 5 nav items visible.

criteriaResults.criterion: Mobile overlay has close (X) button and closes on nav item click
criteriaResults.evidence: X button closes overlay. Clicking nav item closes overlay and navigates.

criteriaResults.criterion: Tablet (768-1024px): sidebar shows icons only by default
criteriaResults.evidence: At 900px viewport, sidebar class is w-60 (expanded) with text labels visible. No responsive logic for tablet auto-collapse. Same failure as attempt 1 — Task 6.1 never executed.
tsc --noEmit succeeds. Vite build succeeds. No console errors in Playwright smoke test.

issues.title: Tablet sidebar not icons-only by default
issues.criterion: Tablet (768-1024px): sidebar shows icons only by default
issues.expected: Sidebar auto-collapsed to w-16 with icons only at 768-1024px viewports
issues.actual: Sidebar fully expanded (w-60) with text labels at all viewports >= 768px
issues.evidence: Playwright test at 900px: class='...w-60', Dashboard label visible=true. No matchMedia/useMediaQuery/lg: breakpoint logic in codebase.

handoff.handoffNotes: Created defect subtask 6.2 to fix tablet viewport sidebar auto-collapse. 16/17 criteria pass. Task 6.1 (same defect) was created in attempt 1 but never built. Task 6.2 includes detailed implementation approaches (CSS responsive classes or media query hook).
